name: Oil Tanker Truck Parking Game
description: Do you like heavy duty oil cargo truck driving simulator games 2021? Then Oil Tanker Transporter Truck Simulator gives you a realistic truck driving experience. Driving big oil tanker and cargo trailer is not a simple task as you have to know all the driving school rules to drive big offroad trucks.
instructions: W Arrow Up rarr Move Front S Arrow Down rarr Move Back A Arrow Left rarr Move Left D Arrow Right rarr Move Right - To click any button use mouse
